sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, str1 String, str2 String, num1 UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, startsWith(str1, str2) AS starts, (num1 % 2) AS mod_result FROM test_strings WHERE startsWith(str1, 'S') AND (num1 % 5) = 0;
SELECT id, startsWith(str1, CONCAT('start', str2)) AS starts, (num1 % 3) AS mod_result FROM test_strings WHERE (startsWith(str1, '') OR startsWith(str2, 'Spi')) AND (num1 % 4) = 0;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_strings GROUP BY startsWith(str1, 'S') HAVING count % 2 = 0;
SELECT id, startsWith(str1, str2) AS starts, (num1 % 2) AS mod_result FROM test_strings WHERE NULLIF(str1, '') IS NOT NULL AND (num1 % NULLIF(num1, 0)) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_results AS SELECT id, startsWith(str1, str2) AS starts FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, starts, (num1 % 10) AS mod_result FROM temp_results WHERE starts = 1 ORDER BY mod_result DESC;
SELECT id, startsWith(replaceNullable(str1, '', 'default'), str2) AS starts, (num1 % 2) AS mod_result FROM test_strings WHERE starts = 1 AND mod_result IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE empty_strings (id UInt32, str1 String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, startsWith(str1, 'test') AS starts FROM empty_strings WHERE str1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (CASE WHEN startsWith(str1, '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS isEmpty FROM test_strings WHERE (num1 % 3) = 1;
